permissions.title: Permissions required
permissions.subtitle: TwinLens needs access to your cameras, microphone and gallery to capture and save your front / back media.
permissions.hintCanAsk: Tap “Grant access”, then accept each request (camera, microphone, gallery).
permissions.hintDenied: A permission was denied. Enable it manually in the app settings.

preview.hiddenSecondaryA11y: Second camera preview hidden — still being recorded

settings.title: Settings
settings.descPipPhoto: One merged image: back + front inset.
settings.descPipVideo: One merged video (re-encoded at the end of the take).
settings.qualityHint: “Max”: 4K photo, 1080p video. Changing quality briefly restarts the cameras.

error.title: Cameras unavailable
error.message: Can’t access the cameras. Another app might be using them.

unsupported.title: Single camera mode
unsupported.textUnsupported: This device doesn’t support simultaneous front + back capture. Automatically switching to a single camera.
unsupported.textMissing: This device doesn’t have both cameras.
unsupported.explain: Simultaneous front + back capture depends on the device ISP: many models only allow it on certain camera combinations, or not at all. TwinLens then falls back to a single camera to stay functional.

pipHint.text: Tap the thumbnail to switch cameras

notices.qualityUnsupported: Quality not supported — reverting to previous setting.
